name: rushee-marketplace
description: Rushee — Full-stack Flutter + Spring Boot engineering discipline: UX Discovery → Strategic DDD → Tactical DDD → FDD → OpenAPI Contract → BDD → ATDD → TDD → Flutter Implementation → Security → Observability. For juniors and teams using Claude or Cursor.

plugins.name: rushee
plugins.description: Complete engineering discipline for full-stack projects: 33 skills, 25 agents, 23 commands, 7 hooks. Default: Flutter + Spring Boot. Also: React, Svelte, Angular (frontends); FastAPI, NestJS, Go, Rust (backends). Same pipeline and OpenAPI contract. UX-first, DDD, contract-first, BDD/ATDD/TDD, clean architecture, security, observability.
